sourceTitle: CU Committee Report: Generative Artificial Intelligence for Education and Pedagogy
evidenceSnippetOriginal: GAI tools also have implications for intellectual property rights. Original research or content that is owned by Cornell University, our students, or employees should not be uploaded to these tools, since they can become part of the training data used by the GAI tools.
evidenceLocator: Section 3.1.2: Attribution, authorship, access, and accountability in the use of GAI
